name: NRB Industrial Bearings Limited
summary: NRB Industrial Bearings Limited manufactures and sells ball and roller bearings for industrial applications in India. The company offers deep groove ball bearings, wide inner ring ball bearings and housed units, spherical and cylindrical roller bearings, bottom and needle roller bearings, and cam followers. It also operates as an agent for manufacturers to supply various types of bearings, including tapered roller bearings and linear guides. The company's products has applications in the factory automation, electrical, medical, renewable, power generation, oil and gas, food and beverage, paper and pulp, metal, mining and mineral processing, materials handling, machine tool, transmission, fluid machinery, and textile industries. It also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
